subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up — glad we connected at the conference and I appreciate your enthusiasm about exploring a partnership.

I would be happy to get a formal meeting on the calendar. Here are three available slots:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00-16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00-16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00-16:00

Please let me know which works best for you, and I will send a calendar invite accordingly.

Regarding your request for the direct contact details (email and phone) for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not able to share internal contact information. If you need to reach them for a senior-level technical call, I am happy to help facilitate the introduction through the appropriate channels.

Thanks again, and I look forward to our conversation!

Best regards
